name: Masoud Pezeshkian
summary: Day 63 Thursday. RIAL 1.8M COLLAPSE VINDICATES PEZESHKIAN'S APR 11 'COLLAPSE WITHIN 3 WEEKS TO 1 MONTH' WARNING (Apr 11 + ~3 weeks = May 1-2; Apr 11 + 1 month = May 11). With rial at 1.8M Apr 29 (-36% in 6 days; ~90% to 2M Brookings hyperinflation trigger), Pezeshkian's economic-warning is functionally CONFIRMED on the timeline he set. But Reuters/Fox wire-tier 'IRGC blocks president' framing means his vindication has limited operational consequence — Vahidi-IRGC inner circle dominates decision-making, not Pezeshkian. Per Axios Apr 27 (corroborated Voice of Emirates), Iran's FM Araghchi told Pakistani, Egyptian, Turkish AND Qatari mediators that 'there's no consensus inside the Iranian leadership' = 'OPERATIONAL PARALYSIS UNDER VAHIDI-IRGC' replaces yesterday's 'unified IRGC defiance' framing. Pezeshkian himself was silent on Trump-Axios doctrine, on rial collapse, and on the FOMC. Pezeshkian's Sunday electricity-rationing call holds as the operational acknowledgement that US blockade is biting at consumer-utility level. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Reuters Apr 28 wire-analysis 'Iran's Guards Seize Wartime Power, Blunting Supreme Leader's Role' (carried by USNews, Times of Israel, Japan Times, Al-Monitor, Express Tribune, Fox News, Israel Hayom, MarketScreener, Kathmandu Post): IRGC consolidation 'now dominates both military strategy AND key political decisions.' Fox News explicit framing: 'IRGC seizes control of Iran state functions, BLOCKS PRESIDENT, report says' — Pezeshkian explicitly named as blocked. The framework graph has encoded under ISW for ~10 days is now CNN/Reuters/USNews-tier wire-source-confirmed. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

active_triggers.condition: Pezeshkian resigns, is removed, or publicly denounces the IRGC power grab
Pezeshkian's 'total collapse within three weeks to one month' economic warning proves correct (early-May deadline)
Pezeshkian publicly meets or is photographed with Mojtaba Khamenei
Pezeshkian publicly forces Vahidi out OR Vahidi forces Pezeshkian out within Trump's 3-5 day window (~April 26 IST)

recent_signals.headline: DAY 60 MONDAY — PEZESHKIAN'S HEAD-OF-STATE PRECONDITION HOLDS POST TRUMP-WINDOW EXPIRY
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED window expiry + Leavitt remarks + Putin-

historical_summaries.summary: 17 signals. 'NECESSARY WILL' SIGNAL TO EU | OPEN LETTER TO AMERICAN PEOPLE | DEADLINE-DAY SILENCE
